languages.text: Probably would break without proper maintenance

traits.locale_text: Probably would break without proper maintenance

languages.text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.
languages.original_text: Молитвы техномата, обращенные к машинному духу турели, наполняют его священной яростью. Все снаряды, выпускаемые турелью, имеют повышенные показатели точности и пробивной мощи. Если молебен прервется, дух преисполнится растерянности.

traits.locale_text: The technomat's prayers addressed to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

The technomat's prayers addressed to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

languages.text: Молитвы техномата, обращенные к машинному духу турели, наполняют его священной яростью. Все снаряды, выпускаемые турелью, имеют повышенные показатели точности и пробивной мощи. Если молебен прервется, дух преисполнится растерянности.

Die Gebete des Technomaten erfüllen den Maschinengeist des Geschützes mit heiligem Zorn. Alle Projektile des Geschützes haben eine höhere Präzision und Durchdringung. Eine Störung der Liturgie wird den Geist irritieren.
languages.original_text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

traits.locale_text: Die Gebete des Technomaten erfüllen den Maschinengeist des Geschützes mit heiligem Zorn. Alle Projektile des Geschützes haben eine höhere Präzision und Durchdringung. Eine Störung der Liturgie wird den Geist irritieren.

languages.text: Las plegarias del tecnómata al espíritu máquina de la torreta la cargan de una furia sagrada. Todos los proyectiles de la torreta gozan de precisión y penetración aumentadas. Interrumpir la liturgia aturdirá al espíritu.
languages.original_text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

traits.locale_text: Las plegarias del tecnómata al espíritu máquina de la torreta la cargan de una furia sagrada. Todos los proyectiles de la torreta gozan de precisión y penetración aumentadas. Interrumpir la liturgia aturdirá al espíritu.

languages.text: 技工向炮台机魂吟诵祈祷，令其充满神圣怒火。炮台射出的所有炮弹都会获得更高的精准度与穿透力。若中断祷文，机魂将陷入困惑。
languages.original_text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

traits.locale_text: 技工向炮台机魂吟诵祈祷，令其充满神圣怒火。炮台射出的所有炮弹都会获得更高的精准度与穿透力。若中断祷文，机魂将陷入困惑。

languages.text: Teknomatın taretin makine ruhuna ettiği dualar, tareti kutsi bir öfkeyle doldurur. Taretin yaptığı tüm atışların isabetlilik ve delme değerleri artar. Ayinin kesintiye uğraması, ruhta şaşkınlığa sebep olur.
languages.original_text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

traits.locale_text: Teknomatın taretin makine ruhuna ettiği dualar, tareti kutsi bir öfkeyle doldurur. Taretin yaptığı tüm atışların isabetlilik ve delme değerleri artar. Ayinin kesintiye uğraması, ruhta şaşkınlığa sebep olur.

languages.text: Les prières du technomate à l'esprit de la machine de la tourelle le remplissent d'une sainte colère. Tous les projectiles de la tourelle bénéficient d'une précision et d'une pénétration accrues. Interrompre la liturgie perturbera l'esprit.
languages.original_text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

traits.locale_text: Les prières du technomate à l'esprit de la machine de la tourelle le remplissent d'une sainte colère. Tous les projectiles de la tourelle bénéficient d'une précision et d'une pénétration accrues. Interrompre la liturgie perturbera l'esprit.

languages.text: テクノマの祈りは砲塔の機械霊を聖なる怒りに満ちる。砲塔から発射される全ての弾は命中率と貫通力が向上する。祈りの邪魔をすることは機械霊を混乱させる。
languages.original_text: The technomat's prayers to the turret's machine spirit fill it with holy fury. All projectiles fired by the turret have increased accuracy and penetration. Interrupting the liturgy will perplex the spirit.

traits.locale_text: テクノマの祈りは砲塔の機械霊を聖なる怒りに満ちる。砲塔から発射される全ての弾は命中率と貫通力が向上する。祈りの邪魔をすることは機械霊を混乱させる。
